author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

Various cleanup that came up within the CODE4hep project:
* Removing unused variables
* Add missing `#include`, avoid inconsistent iterator type in MessageLogger
* Mark variables used only in `assert()` with `[[maybe_unused]]`
* In `FWCore/Integration` test modules, replace `assert()` with exceptions
  * To ensure the checks will be run even with `-DNDEBUG`

#### PR validation:

Code compiles.
title: Remove unused variables and other cleanup in the framework
